meta.title: AIcon — 10× your business with AI
meta.description: AI consulting for marketing, sales, ops and HR. We spot your problems early, solve them with AI, and make you 10× faster and sharper.

hero.title: 10× your
hero.subtitle: We spot your problems before you do, then solve them with AI. Up to 10× less time, less cost, more accuracy.

crisis.title: 95% of AI projects fail.
crisis.body: Companies spend billions on AI, but most pilots never ship. The problem isn't the model — it's not knowing where and how to deploy AI.

reasoning.title: The model thinks. We act.
reasoning.body: Every vertical → one agent, one playbook, one KPI. No demo, no prompt-shop.

verticals.title: 4 places AI actually moves the needle

items.name: Marketing
items.body: Content production, personalization, customer behavior analytics, campaign optimization.

items.name: Sales Funnel
items.body: Lead scoring, outreach automation, CRM enrichment, call analysis.

items.name: Operations
items.body: Process automation, document processing, quality control, predictive maintenance.

items.name: Human Resources
items.body: Screening, onboarding, performance analytics, L&D personalization.

method.title: From diagnosis to deployment, in 90 days

steps.title: Audit
steps.body: We map your workflows, data, and gaps. We find problems before you do.

steps.title: Blueprint
steps.body: One AI solution per problem. ROI and timeline before we touch a thing.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Implementation with your team. Data plumbing, agents, integrations.

steps.title: Operate
steps.body: Monthly retainer to maintain, iterate, scale — for as long as you want.

proof.title: We tested it on ourselves first.
proof.body: Our team automated 90% of its internal processes with AI. Now we transfer the same playbook to yours.

cta.title: Let's find where AI fits in your business.
cta.body: Book a free 30-minute audit. Get an ROI estimate and an initial roadmap.
